description: CompositionGreen tea round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline and grunge look graphic with flock detailing on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print If you love to spread happiness wherever you go, then this round neck  t-shirt from mr. men is perfect for you. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the grunge look Mr. Tickle graphic with the flock print detailing is sure to make your friends laugh. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders- "
